query: What is the boiling point of water at sea level?
research_plan:
SUB-QUESTIONS:
1. Exact boiling point temperature of water at 1 atmosphere (101.325 kPa) in Celsius.
2. Exact boiling point temperature of water at 1 atmosphere in Fahrenheit and Kelvin.
3. Definition of standard atmospheric pressure used to define "sea level" conditions.

SEARCH QUERIES (4 different phrasings, use technical terms):
- "standard boiling point water 1 atm temperature"
- "water saturation temperature at 101.325 kPa"
- "phase transition temperature H2O standard atmospheric pressure"
- "thermodynamic properties of water boiling point sea level"

BEST WEBSITES TO CHECK DIRECTLY:
- https://www.nist.gov
- https://www.engineeringtoolbox.com
- https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov

DONE WHEN:
- Confirmed boiling point values in Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.
- Verified the standard pressure definition (1 atm / 760 mmHg).
- Data corroborated by 2-3 independent authoritative sources.
